snipet_ready_subtitle: Please wait while we prepare your order for serving
all_served_subtitle: You can pay now or add more dishes.
cancel_blocked: Cannot cancel — some items are already being prepared
ws_snippet_body: Dish statuses update in real time — no page refresh needed.
paid_banner_sub_cooking: A waiter will collect payment — table stays open until all dishes are served
paid_banner_sub_cooking_epay: Thank you! Your dishes are still being prepared — table stays open until served
waiter_call_cooldown_msg: The waiter has already been called — please wait a moment
liqpay_unavailable: Online payments are not available at this restaurant
reviews_sub: Share your experience to help other guests
reviews_error: Couldn't submit the review. Please try again.
reviews_login_required: Log in to leave a review
reviews_all_done: You've left reviews for everything in this order. Thank you!
pay_cash_desc: A waiter will come to your table
pay_card_not_configured: Online payment is not configured for this restaurant. Please pay in cash.
pay_card_invalid_credentials: Payment configuration error. Please contact the restaurant or pay in cash.
pay_card_unavailable: Card payment is temporarily unavailable. Please try again or pay in cash.
pay_warn_body: After confirming payment, you will no longer be able to add, remove, or change dishes. Your table stays open until all dishes are served.
pay_cash_confirm: A waiter will come to your table to collect the cash payment. Confirm?
pay_card_confirm: You will be redirected to LiqPay to complete the payment. Confirm?
cancel_item_confirm: Remove this dish from the order?
cancel_step2_hint: Confirm again — this cannot be undone
